title: Leading roofing manufacturer uses AI to speed network optimization
description: GAF’s Marianna Vydrevich said AI-powered analytics are helping supply chain teams automate workflows, optimize inventory and model disruptions. The post Leading roofing manufacturer uses AI to speed network optimization appeared first on FreightWaves .

title: Why I Still Subscribe to Magazines in the AI Era
description: A KAIST professor reflects on why he still subscribes to magazines in the AI era, as Korea's magazine revenue fell 21% to 531.5 billion won and global titles like Self and Glamour shut down.
